blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,659 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
